label: phishing
description: PayPal brand spoof with mismatched sender domain

email.subject: URGENT: Verify your account within 24 hours
email.bodyText: We detected unusual activity on your account. Click here immediately to verify your credentials or your account will be suspended.

email.subject: Action required: confirm your identity
email.bodyText: Your password will expire today. Sign in now to avoid losing access.

label: phishing
description: CEO wire transfer scam with urgency

email.subject: Wire transfer needed immediately
email.bodyText: I need you to process a wire transfer for a confidential acquisition. Act now and keep this confidential.

email.subject: Mailbox quota exceeded
email.bodyText: Your mailbox is full. Update your account to restore service.

email.subject: Your Apple ID has been locked
email.bodyText: Verify your Apple ID immediately to regain access.

label: phishing
description: Amazon impersonation with gift card request

email.subject: Payment failed — update your payment method
email.bodyText: We could not process your order. Purchase a gift card to verify your account and complete checkout.

email.subject: Unusual sign-in attempt detected
email.bodyText: Someone tried to access your account. Click below to secure your account within 24 hours.

email.subject: Your subscription has been suspended
email.bodyText: Update your payment information immediately to restore streaming access.

email.subject: Verify your account now
email.bodyText: We noticed unusual activity. Confirm your identity to avoid account suspension.

email.subject: Document awaiting your signature
email.bodyText: You have a pending document. Click here to review and sign immediately.

label: phishing
description: BEC wire transfer with reply-to on suspicious TLD

email.subject: Confidential wire transfer request
email.bodyText: I need a wire transfer processed today for a vendor acquisition. Keep this between us and reply to confirm.

label: phishing
description: LinkedIn spoof with deceptive profile link

email.subject: Someone viewed your profile
email.bodyText: A recruiter viewed your profile. Sign in to see who it was.

label: phishing
description: Minimal body with single deceptive link

email.subject: Shared document
email.bodyText: Please review the attached policy update immediately. Click here to open the document.

email.subject: Order hold — verify shipping address
email.bodyText: We could not verify your shipping address. Confirm your account details to release the order.

description: Credential harvesting on suspicious TLD only

email.subject: Portal maintenance tonight
email.bodyText: Re-authenticate before the maintenance window begins. Confirm your credentials to avoid lockout.

label: phishing
description: IRS tax refund scam with urgency

email.subject: Immediate action required for your tax refund
email.bodyText: Your refund is pending verification. Confirm your identity immediately to receive payment.

email.subject: Delivery attempt failed — action required
email.bodyText: We could not deliver your package. Click below to reschedule immediately.

email.subject: Unusual wallet activity detected
email.bodyText: We detected unusual activity on your wallet. Verify your recovery phrase immediately.

email.subject: Open enrollment ends today
email.bodyText: Your benefits selection is incomplete. Sign in now to avoid losing coverage. Confirm your identity to finalize elections. Act now before open enrollment closes.

label: phishing
description: Display name shows different email than From header

email.bodyText: Your mailbox is almost full. Update your account to avoid losing messages.
